text.message: i'm not throwing, i am doing best i can with what you left me. i think this sin't that unexpected. you had better options there as well, you just completely ruined it for me
so not knowing what my best option is
because you are on that brick port
i think you are the leader
big man with a big road
you will have road, you have a dev
Bro blue is the leader not me
yes, thanks to you i did
but i still want my spot
